personal.summary: Highly accomplished Computer Network & Systems Engineer with a proven track record of optimizing network performance, ICT Support, and supporting enterprise IT systems, networks, and users across education and business environments. Skilled in Microsoft-based environments, network monitoring, system administration, and IT service management. Holds a degree in Computer Science & Cybersecurity and boasts superior technological acumen. Demonstrates a professional demeanour, exceptional analytical capabilities, and a knack for excelling in collaborative team settings.
personal.name: Nima Dorji Moktan
personal.tagline: I build secure, reliable IT systems and empower people through technology.

experience.title: IT Support Officer
experience.overview: Provide end-to-end IT support and manage institutional systems, infrastructure, and student-facing platforms in a fast-paced education environment.
responsibilities: Provide technical support for desktop systems, software, and network infrastructure
Manage IT systems including LMS platforms, student systems (MESHED), and internal applications
Monitor system performance, ensure uptime, and maintain network reliability
Maintain IT policies, procedures, backups, and data security practices
Coordinate with vendors and enforce service level agreements (SLAs)
Support student services including enrolment systems, records management, and front-line support
achievements: Improved system reliability and user experience through proactive monitoring and troubleshooting
Streamlined student support processes, improving response times and service efficiency
Strengthened data security and backup processes ensuring compliance and system integrity

experience.title: Lecturer – Cybersecurity & ICT
experience.overview: Deliver practical cybersecurity and IT infrastructure training aligned with industry standards.
responsibilities: Design and deliver hands-on labs covering network security, system administration and vulnerability assessment
Support students in troubleshooting system, network, and security issues
Develop technical learning resources and practical exercises
achievements: Improved student practical competency in IT support and cybersecurity tools
Developed real-world lab environments simulating enterprise systems

experience.title: Sessional Tutor – Cyber Security & ICT
experience.overview: Provide academic and technical support in cybersecurity and networking units.
responsibilities: Assist students with system configuration, networking and cybersecurity tools
Support lab environments and troubleshoot technical issues
Explain complex IT concepts to diverse learners
achievements: Improved student performance and understanding of technical systems
Enhanced engagement through practical and structured teaching approaches

experience.title: ICT Support & Systems Intern
experience.overview: Supported enterprise IT systems, infrastructure, and operational environments.
responsibilities: Monitor system performance and conduct health checks on servers and networks
Perform vulnerability scans and network analysis using Wireshark and Nmap
Assist with patch management, updates, and system maintenance
Troubleshoot hardware, software and network issues
achievements: Identified network vulnerabilities and supported remediation actions
Improved system reliability through proactive monitoring and maintenance

experience.title: Web Master & IT Support Coordinator
experience.overview: Maintain IT infrastructure and provide technical support to internal users.
responsibilities: Monitor and maintain IT systems, servers and web infrastructure
Provide technical support for hardware, software and network issues
Implement system monitoring and performance tracking tools
Deliver cybersecurity awareness and user training
achievements: Improved system uptime and performance through proactive maintenance
Reduced user-related security risks through awareness training

experience.title: ICT Teacher / Educational Technologist
experience.overview: Delivered ICT education and supported technical infrastructure across schools.
responsibilities: Maintain ICT systems, networks and devices across multiple environments
Provide technical support to staff and students
Deliver training on cybersecurity, networking and digital systems
Contribute to ICT curriculum development
achievements: Co-authored national ICT curriculum framework integrating cybersecurity
Improved digital literacy and system usage across institutions
